pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and modernize the framework stack.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and introduces breaking API changes (Jakarta EE namespace); the old version 2.6.3 is incompatible with the target environment and dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 21; keeping 17 would result in incorrect bytecode version or missing language features.

src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 6 API changes.
src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter was removed in Spring Security 6; extending it causes a compile error (class not found).

src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.general_idea: Replace authorizeRequests() with authorizeHttpRequests() and use lambda configuration for request matching.
src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.why_exists: authorizeRequests() was removed in Spring Security 6; calling it causes a compile error (method not found).

src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.general_idea: Replace mvcMatchers() with requestMatchers() to align with Spring Security 6 API.
src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.why_exists: mvcMatchers() was removed in Spring Security 6; calling it causes a compile error (method not found).

src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.general_idea: Replace .and().httpBasic() with .httpBasic(withDefaults()) to comply with new fluent API.
src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.why_exists: The .and() method and the no-arg httpBasic() were removed/changed in Spring Security 6; calling them causes a compile error.

src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.general_idea: Wrap security configuration in a SecurityFilterChain bean and return the built chain.
src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.why_exists: Spring Security 6 requires security configuration to be defined via a SecurityFilterChain bean; the old @Override configure method is no longer recognized.
src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.before:
@Override
-  protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {

src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.general_idea: Add return statement to build and return the SecurityFilterChain.
src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.why_exists: The new SecurityFilterChain bean method must return a SecurityFilterChain instance; omitting it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/customer/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/customer/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.general_idea: Update import path for LocalServerPort to match Spring Boot 3.3 package structure.
src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.web.server.LocalServerPort was removed in Spring Boot 3.3; using the old import causes a compile error.

src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.general_idea: Update import for LocalServerPort to match Spring Boot 3.3 package structure.
src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.web.server.LocalServerPort was removed in Spring Boot 3.3; using the old import causes a compile error (class not found).
